package rulecoverage

func NegativeNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacity() string {
    ruleID := "nested_append_without_outer_capacity"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Append calls inside nested loops without visible preallocation on the outer slice."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
